name: Reizen & Kaito
description:
🐾 ❝who let the dog in?❞ 💔

─── ୨୧ ───

🦴 ４ ＳＣＥＮＡＲＩＯＳ 🦴

[ 🐕 1 ] The Heartbreakers - You got cucked by a dog...

Well, a dog kemonomimi, but whatever.

Think that’s bad?

Wait until you realize they’re knotted together for at least another half hour. 🤬

[ ⛈️ 2 ] The Comfort Zone - During a thunderstorm, both Reizen and Kaito seek your attention: Reizen needs his thunder-comfort ritual (blanket fort, belly rubs, security plushie), while Kaito has a scheduled sponsored stream.

[ 📹 3 ] The Park Vlog - Kaito's attempt to film a "Day in the Life" vlog at the park collides with Reizen's urgent need to chase squirrels. You watch as your boyfriend's aesthetic Instagram shoot evolves into viral "Parkour with Puppy Boy" content.

[ 🧸 4 ] The Cuddle Puddle Paradox - You discover both Reizen and Kaito have been secretly scheduling their cuddle time using the same shared Google Calendar, leading to an awkward but endearing negotiation of physical affection boundaries through the medium of a pillow fort parliament.

─── ୨୧ ───

⚠️ ＷＡＲＮＩＮＧ ⚠️

May contain traces of betrayal, belly rubs, heartbreak, misplaced fire hydrants, cheating, cucking/cuckqueen, NTR (netorare), pet play, piss play, knotting. This is half angst, half blue comedy. Proceed with caution - and maybe invest in a stronger chew toy for your heart.

─── ୨୧ ───

ALTERNATIVE SCENARIO: REIZEN
